racehub.heading: Squad distribution
racehub.sameDayNote: Same real day, different race days. A rider can ride one race per race day.

learnReuse.title: Reusing a rider across race days
learnReuse.body: These races share one afternoon but fall on different in-game race days, so a rider can ride both. He carries fatigue into the later race. That is a trade-off, not a bug.

racehub.leaveUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

pool.title: Available riders · {count}-squad
pool.bound: Already racing in an overlapping race

popover.title: Add to which race?
popover.none: No race available for this rider today
popover.compatibleHint: Same day as {race}, race day {day}. Can ride both.
popover.compatibleHintNoDay: Same day as {race}. Can ride both.

role.hint: Tap a rider to set captain or role

roleCard.heading: Tactics
roleCard.subhead: Give each rider a job. The hint shows why the role fits this terrain.

hint.flat: Your protected leader. The team rides to deliver them to the flat finish.
hint.hilly: Your protected leader on the climbs. The team shelters them to the hilly finish.
hint.mountain: Your protected leader in the mountains. The team paces them to the summit.
hint.cobbles: Your protected leader over the cobbles. The team keeps them out of trouble.
hint.itt: The rider you back for the time trial. No team support applies here.

hint.flat: Your finisher for a bunch sprint. The team leads them out on the flat.
hint.hilly: Your finisher if the hills end in a reduced sprint.
hint.mountain: Sprints rarely decide a mountain stage. Useful only for an early sprint.
hint.cobbles: Your finisher if the cobbles come back together for a sprint.
hint.itt: A sprint role has no effect in a time trial.

hint.flat: Sends this rider up the road. On flat finishes a breakaway can stay away.
hint.hilly: Sends this rider on the attack. Hilly finales reward a hunter.
hint.mountain: Sends this rider clear. A mountain breakaway can hold to the line.
hint.cobbles: Sends this rider into the cobbled break. It can stick to the finish.
hint.itt: There is no breakaway in a time trial.

hint.flat: No special role. Rides in support of your captain and sprinter.
hint.hilly: No special role. Rides in support on the climbs.
hint.mountain: No special role. Paces and protects your leader in the mountains.
hint.cobbles: No special role. Helps position your leaders over the cobbles.
hint.itt: No special role. Each rider races the time trial alone.

hint.flat: Rides their own race on the flat. No team duties, no captain support.
hint.hilly: Rides their own race on the climbs. No team duties, no captain support.
hint.mountain: Rides their own race in the mountains. No team duties, no captain support.
hint.cobbles: Rides their own race over the cobbles. No team duties, no captain support.
hint.itt: Rides their own race in the time trial. No team duties, no captain support.

breakawayStrength.label: Breakaway odds
breakawayStrength.tooltip: How likely a breakaway is to stay away on this terrain. The hunter is always a breakaway candidate.

hunterExplainer.title: How the breakaway hunter works
hunterExplainer.body: The hunter is always sent into the day's breakaway and rides harder to stay clear. Whether the move holds to the finish depends on the terrain.
hunterExplainer.strengthLine: On this race's terrain, a breakaway has {strength} odds of staying away.
hunterExplainer.candidatesHint: Ranked by aggression: the urge to attack and commit to a move.
hunterExplainer.noCandidates: Pick riders for this race to see your best hunters.

lineupLocked.title: Lineup locked
lineupLocked.note: This race has started. The lineup is final.

racehub.empty: No races to plan for this day.
racehub.regenerateWarn: This replaces every pick on today's races with the assistant's suggestion. Continue?

raceType.stageRaceWithStages: Stage race · {count, plural, one {# stage} other {# stages}}

empty.addRaceAdmin: Add races in the Admin panel
empty.noResultsImportedRace: No results imported for this race yet

calendar.expectedPoolTooltip: Live-calculated expected pool based on race class × race type × stages
calendar.selectPrompt: Select a race to see details

world.totalRaces: {count} races in total across the world calendar

points.title: Points & prize overview
points.subtitle: How your race prizes are calculated from your placements
points.noClassData: No points data for this class

Forertroje.label: Leader's jersey
Forertroje.desc: Per day in the leader's jersey

PointtrojeDag.label: Points jersey (per day)
PointtrojeDag.desc: Per day in the points jersey

BjergtrojeDag.label: Mountains jersey (per day)
BjergtrojeDag.desc: Per day in the mountains jersey

UngdomstrojeDag.label: Young rider jersey (per day)
UngdomstrojeDag.desc: Per day in the young rider jersey

selection.title: Team selection
selection.subtitle: Pick up to {max} riders for this race. You can save a partial team, and your assistant fields the rest when the race runs. No penalty.
selection.suitabilityHelp: Suitability (0-100) rates how well a rider fits this race's terrain. Higher is a better match.
selection.bestForStage: Your strongest fit for this stage
selection.whyBest: This {bucket} stage rewards your strongest fit: {name}.
selection.autoPicked: Assistant's pick. Adjust and save to take control.

wrongPool.title: This race is in another division
wrongPool.note: You can only enter races in your own division, so there's no line-up to set here.

errors.selection_wrong_size: You can pick at most {max} riders.
errors.selection_insufficient_riders: You don't have enough available riders for a full team. Withdraw from this race or sign free agents.
errors.move_target_full: That race is already full. Remove a rider there first.
errors.move_target_locked: That race has started, so its lineup is locked.
errors.move_wrong_pool: You can only enter races in your own division.
errors.move_rider_ineligible: That rider can't race for your team right now.
errors.move_invalid_body: Couldn't move the rider. Try again.
errors.move_failed: Couldn't move the rider. Try again.
errors.selection_captain_required: Pick a captain among your selected riders.
errors.selection_captain_not_selected: Your captain must be one of the selected riders.
errors.selection_role_not_selected: Role riders must be part of the selection.
errors.selection_role_overlap: Captain, sprint captain and hunter must be different riders.
errors.selection_rider_not_on_team: You can only select your own riders.
errors.selection_duplicate_rider: Each rider can only be selected once.
errors.selection_race_not_open: Selection is closed for this race.
errors.selection_race_started: This race has started, so the lineup is locked.
errors.selection_rider_bound: This rider is already racing in an overlapping race.
errors.selection_rider_bound_named: {rider} is already racing {race}, which overlaps. Remove them there, or pick someone else.
errors.selection_invalid_body: Couldn't save the selection. Try again.
errors.selection_wrong_pool: You can only enter races in your own division.
errors.strategy_invalid_body: Couldn't save your strategy: invalid data.
errors.strategy_flag_disabled: The race hub isn't active yet.
errors.generic: Couldn't save the selection. Try again.
errors.saveAllPartial: These lineups weren't saved: {races}. Your changes are still here, so try saving again.

stageTactics.title: Stage tactics
stageTactics.help: Completed stages are locked. Changes apply to upcoming stages only.
stageTactics.jerseyShortcutHint: {name} is your rider in the leader's jersey.
stageTactics.jerseyShortcut: Make {name} captain for the remaining stages

errors.stage_roles_invalid_body: Couldn't save your tactics. Try again.
errors.stage_roles_stage_locked: One of the changes is on a completed stage, so it can't be saved.
errors.stage_roles_rider_not_entered: One of the riders isn't entered in this race.
errors.stage_roles_invalid_role: One of the roles isn't valid.
errors.stage_roles_invalid_effort: One of the effort settings isn't valid.
errors.stage_roles_role_overlap: Only one rider can be captain, and only one can be sprint captain, per stage.
errors.stage_roles_duplicate: The same rider appears twice for the same stage.
errors.stage_roles_race_completed: This race is finished, so tactics can't be changed anymore.
errors.generic: Couldn't save your tactics. Try again.

strategy.title: Team strategy
strategy.subtitle: Standing preferences your assistant uses to build every lineup.

aChain.title: A-chain
aChain.help: Your core riders, ranked. They get priority for your target races.
aChain.empty: No core riders yet. Add the riders you build around.

roleRules.title: Fixed roles
roleRules.help: Lock a rider to a role whenever they're selected.

captains.title: Captains by terrain
captains.help: Ranked captain candidates per terrain. The assistant picks the highest-ranked selected rider.

targets.title: Target races
targets.help: Mark the races that matter most. Your A-chain is prioritized here.

preview.title: How your strategy changes selections
preview.none: No changes to upcoming auto-filled races.

discoverCta.title: Pick your race squad
discoverCta.bodyStage: {race} is coming up. Choose your riders, captain and tactics before the start.
discoverCta.bodyOneDay: {race} is coming up. Choose your riders, captain and tactics before the start.

terrainDna.label: Terrain DNA · what the stage rewards

liveStandings.title: Standings after stage {number}
liveStandings.note: The race is still in progress. Standings update after each stage.

recap.title: Race recap
recap.breakawaySurvived: {count, plural, one {A lone rider stayed away to the finish.} other {A #-rider breakaway stayed away to the finish.}}
recap.breakawayCaught: {count, plural, one {The lone breakaway rider was caught before the line.} other {The breakaway (# riders) was caught before the line.}}
recap.teamDay: {team} led the team classification with {count} riders in the top 10.
recap.jerseys: Jersey leaders: {points} in points, {mountain} in the mountains.

stageProfile.label: Terrain
stageProfile.note: Indicative terrain category based on each stage's difficulty.

stageSchedule.title: Stage schedule
stageSchedule.subtitle: Each stage runs at a fixed time (Copenhagen).

history.accumulatedSub: Top riders by total points across all editions

browse.heading: {division} · {pool}
browse.horizonNote: Start lists open {count} days before each race. Roles, form and fatigue stay hidden.
browse.empty: No races in this pool on this day.
browse.grossOnly: Gross squads only. Roles, form and fatigue hidden.
browse.opensIn: {count, plural, one {Opens in # day} other {Opens in # days}}
